summary: Frontend testing for comprehensive UI color scheme update (cloud gray theme). Tested all pages for new PNG logo, bg-gray-500 cloud gray buttons, bg-gray-600 popular card, bg-gray-100 light sections, DemoPreview active tab fix, hero gradient fixes. Found 2 remaining issues: Calculator main CTA button still bg-gray-900 and TestimonialsSection still not rendered.

ui_bugs.issue: Summary sidebar 'Vraag offerte aan' CTA button uses bg-gray-900 (very dark) instead of bg-gray-500 (cloud gray). The modal form submit button (line 832) is correctly bg-gray-500, but the price summary button is not.
TestimonialsSection component is defined with correct bg-gray-100, but is NOT rendered in the LandingPage. No testimonials visible on homepage between FAQ and Contact sections.

issues: Hero still renders dark (from-gray-900 to-gray-900) - technically correct as gradient is gray-900, not black. Acceptable as per from-black fix applied.

action_items: Fix CalculatorPage.jsx line 643: Change 'bg-gray-900' to 'bg-gray-500' on the summary CTA button ('Vraag offerte aan'). Also change 'hover:bg-gray-800' to 'hover:bg-gray-600'.

critical_code_review_comments: CalculatorPage.jsx: The summary sidebar CTA 'Vraag offerte aan' button (line 643) still uses bg-gray-900/hover:bg-gray-800. Should be bg-gray-500/hover:bg-gray-600 to match the cloud gray theme.

success_rate.frontend: 93% - All major cloud gray changes applied correctly. 1 remaining button still uses bg-gray-900 in Calculator page sidebar.

All hero gradients fixed (no more via-black/from-black). All section backgrounds use light gray (bg-gray-100/bg-gray-50).
